description: Capabilities for the main visualizer window. Grants the minimum core IPC + event-listen surface so the React frontend can call our custom #[tauri::command] functions and subscribe to gol://* events. Emit permission is deliberately NOT granted — only the Rust side ever emits, so opening that hole would let any future XSS spoof board-tick/session-changed events and silently overwrite client state. Filesystem and dialog permissions land with the file-ops todo.
